data.title: NYSE pre-market update for July 17, 2025 includes celebration of Disneyland Resort's 70th anniversary with The Walt Disney Company ringing the Opening Bell.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update, featuring insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can access the update to gain valuable market information before the trading day commences. The update was presented by Caroline Woods on this particular day. Stay informed with the NYSE pre-market update for a competitive edge in trading.
US Weather Agency CPC Says Neutral ENSO Conditions Still Continue, With Sea Surface Temperatures Near Normal Over Most Of The Equatorial Pacific

data.title: Cintas Corp's Q4 fiscal 2025 revenue reached $2.67B, up 8% YoY; impacted by one less workday this quarter.
data.description: Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) announced its fiscal 2025 fourth-quarter results, ending on May 31, 2025. The revenue for this quarter rose to $2.67 billion, showcasing an 8.0% growth from the previous year's fourth quarter revenue of $2.47 billion. The decrease in workdays compared to the same quarter in fiscal 2024 had a negative impact, but when adjusted for the same number of workdays, the revenue saw an increase of 9.6% in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025.

data.title: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to report Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025. Conference call at 10am ET. Dial (877) 407-4018 (domestic) or (201) 689-8471 (international).
data.description: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) is set to announce its Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025, before the markets open. A conference call and webcast for investors will follow at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Those interested can join the call by dialing (877) 407-4018 domestically or (201) 689-8471 internationally. Participants will need to identify themselves upon dialing in.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) will report Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025. Conference call at 10:30am ET.
data.description: In Calabasas, California, Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI), a prominent brokerage firm focusing on commercial real estate investment sales, financing, and advisory services, disclosed it will release its financial outcomes for Q2 of 2025 on August 7, 2025, before the market opens. The company will organize a webcast and conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to analyze the results.

data.title: KB Home has announced the opening of a new community in Del Valle, Texas.
data.description: Austin-based homebuilder KB Home has recently revealed the launch of its latest community in Del Valle, Texas. This new development is a notable addition to the company's portfolio, providing prospective buyers with a range of housing options. With this expansion, KB Home aims to offer residents in the area a diverse selection of homes tailored to varying preferences and budgets. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the real estate sector.

data.title: Urban Air named top workplace for Gen Z by Newsweek in 2025 for empowering next-gen leaders. - Dallas, July 17, 2025
data.description: Leading the way in family entertainment centers, Urban Air Adventure Park has recently been commended for its commitment to fostering and nurturing the leaders of tomorrow. The top-ranked franchise has solidified its position as the number one choice for indoor adventure parks worldwide. A key player in youth enrichment, Urban Air Adventure Park is synonymous with innovation and quality, catering to families and youths alike. The recognition comes at a pivotal time for the company, with the acknowledgment underscoring its dedication to empowering the next generation.

data.title: Holman Logistics named Top 100 3PL for 2025 by Inbound Logistics for the 10th year. FEDERAL WAY, Wash., July 17.
data.description: For the 10th year in a row, Holman Logistics has secured a spot on the esteemed Top 100 list. Based in FEDERAL WAY, Wash., the company received this recognition on July 17, 2025. Holman Logistics, known for its excellence in third-party logistics services (3PL), was acknowledged by Inbound Logistics, a prominent industry authority. The company's consistent inclusion in the list is a testament to its reliability and success in the field. More information can be found on their website at holmanusa.com.

data.title: AirConsole partners with Atari to offer classic games in cars; Asteroids and Breakout: Recharged now on supported Volkswagen models.
data.description: AirConsole has announced a partnership with Atari, a leading entertainment brand, to bring in-car gaming to supported Volkswagen models. This move positions AirConsole as the primary platform for in-car gaming. Starting now, Volkswagen vehicles can access classic games like Asteroids and Breakout: Recharged. The collaboration will provide an enhanced entertainment experience for passengers. The news was shared on July 17, 2025, in Zurich.
United Airlines CEO: •Aviation sector might “wind up” being excluded from tariffs •Boeing ($BA) is “back on track”

data.title: Technosylva appoints Bob Rowe to Board of Directors to enhance wildfire management. LA JOLLA, Calif. and LEÓN, Spain. July 17, 2025.
data.description: Technosylva has announced the appointment of a new industry expert to provide valuable insights and guidance to the company's solutions and clients. The appointee brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the role. The company, based in La Jolla, Calif., and León, Spain, is renowned for its wildfire and extreme weather modeling services. This move is aimed at enhancing risk mitigation and operational efficiency for Technosylva’s customers. The appointment was made public on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Oh Norman! pet wellness brand co-founded by Kaley Cuoco raised $2.08M, total funding now over $5M, aiming for $1M.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in New York, Oh Norman!, a pet wellness brand launched by actress and animal advocate Kaley Cuoco, revealed that it has secured $2.08 million in its most recent funding round. This funding has pushed the total investment in the brand to exceed $5 million. Initially aiming for $1 million, Oh Norman! has surpassed expectations, demonstrating strong support and growth potential in the market.

data.title: New Toasted Yolk Cafe opening in Atlantic Beach, FL on July 21, 2025. Free meals offered during soft opening events.
data.description: During the soft opening events this fall in Atlantic Beach, Florida, The Toasted Yolk Cafe will be offering a complimentary meal to all guests, as a way to support a local charity. The newest Florida location of the cafe is set to open on July 21, 2025. This initiative aims to attract customers with a unique offer while also giving back to the community. The event is expected to draw a large crowd, with the cafe anticipating serving hundreds of guests during the opening period.

data.title: Apps4.Pro enhances Microsoft 365 migration with 10+ workload coverage, simplifying moving across Exchange, Teams, SharePoint, Power BI, and more.
data.description: Apps4.Pro, a respected provider of Microsoft 365 management solutions based in TIRUNELVELI, India, announced on July 17, 2025, its advancement in simplifying migration processes across various platforms. This development eliminates the challenges associated with using multiple tools when moving between Exchange, Teams, SharePoint, Power BI, Viva Engage, Power Automate, Forms, and more. The company's innovative approach streamlines these migrations, enhancing efficiency for users.

data.title: Infinite Books acquires Jonathan Tepper's memoir "Shooting Up" about his childhood in Madrid's San Blas, showcasing a unique story.
data.description: In a recent announcement on July 17, 2025, Infinite Books disclosed the acquisition of "Shooting Up," an impactful memoir penned by renowned author and investor Jonathan Tepper. The memoir delves into Tepper's remarkable upbringing in Madrid's San Blas district, presenting a vivid account of his childhood experiences.

data.title: MAP Medical partners with Metrix-Secure, becoming an authorized distributor. Strengthening commitment to reliability.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Chicago-based company MAP Medical announced a significant development through a partnership with Metrix-Secure. The agreement designates MAP Medical as an authorized distributor for the well-known manufacturer, showcasing a strategic move to enhance their service offerings. This collaboration underscores MAP Medical's dedication to providing trustworthy products to their customers.

data.title: Ted Kitchens joins Paslay Group as Engagement Executive, bringing vast experience in aviation industry.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on July 17, 2025, Paslay Group made an announcement regarding welcoming Theodore "Ted" Kitchens, A.A.E. into their team. Kitchens is a noted aviation industry executive with experience in leading business strategy and capital development initiatives across locations like Houston and Atlanta. This addition was regarded as significant for the nation's premier aviation group.

data.title: MedeAnalytics partners with DecisionRx to use predictive analytics for medication optimization, July 17, 2025.
data.description: Richardson, Texas - DecisionRx has teamed up with MedeAnalytics on July 17, 2025 to enhance value-based medication optimization. MedeAnalytics is a top healthcare enterprise data enrichment platform and analytics SaaS provider. This collaboration will leverage MedeAnalytics' expertise to drive better healthcare outcomes in a value-based care model.
